Explicit with id and language class:

``` {.haskell #mycode}
qsort [] = []
```

Explicit with language, extra class, and quoted key-value:

``` {.python .numberLines startFrom="10"}
x = 42
```

Explicit attribute block with no language:

``` {#myid key="value"}
plain text
```

Shortcut language followed by an attribute block:

```haskell {.numberLines}
main = pure ()
```
